subcodes.first_line: The gaze of divine benevolence hath ever been and shall remain directed towards the loved ones, and He hath gladdened them all with tidings of manifest bounties [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لحاظ عنایت الهی متوجه احباء بوده و خواهد بود و جمیع را بشارت فرموده بنعمتهای ظاهره
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @exhortations and counsels, @knowledge; recognition of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
